curmudgeon_rubric: DIRECTIVE-20260422-003 (design rubric — truth-impact lens, relax on style-guide pedantry, keep adversarial on functional a11y)
summary: Functional augmentation: every verdict chip on the site (td.v-* cells, verdict-tag spans, verdict-badge spans across generate-html.js, sections.json part5, wins.json WIN-011) wrapped in <a class="verdict-link" href="#def-{slug}" onclick="goToDefinition(...);return false" aria-label="..."> pointing to one of six new def-* anchor IDs on the verdict-legend block. Adds CSS for hover/focus affordances + a 1.5s box-shadow pulse on landing (with prefers-reduced-motion override), a goToDefinition() helper, and a hashchange listener for direct anchor clicks. Pending verdicts stay unwrapped. Six new test.js assertions lock the augmentation in place.

files_modified.build-scripts/generate-html.js: CSS additions (~7 lines incl. reduced-motion override), six id attributes on verdict-legend, two mapping objects (VERDICT_DEF_ID, PRED_DEF_ID), goToDefinition() function, hashchange listener, formatTableRow rewrite, formatPredictionDetail four-site rewrite
files_modified.data/sections.json: part5 — wrap 12-13 of the 14 verdict-badge spans (skip 'pending' slug instances)

acceptance_criteria_summary: Build succeeds, all six def-* ids resolve, chip click → tab switch + scroll + 1.5s pulse, hashchange handler fires only on def-* fragments, prefers-reduced-motion replaces pulse with static outline, all six new assertions pass.
notes_for_decider: TRACKER DESYNC NOTICE: EXP-250 and EXP-251 are not currently in monitor/analyst/expansion-tracker.json (next_id=250, items count=248, last entry EXP-249). The decider should append EXP-250, EXP-251, EXP-252 in order and set next_id=253 on integration. EXP-250 file = monitor/analyst/expansions/EXP-250-phase-b2-docx-scope-obsolete.json (status=complete), EXP-251 file = monitor/analyst/expansions/EXP-251-phase-b3-prefix-unification.json (status=complete). EXP-250-phase-b3-prefix-unification.json is a withdrawal stub (item_id=EXP-250-phase-b3-WITHDRAWN) and should NOT be added to the tracker.

INTEGRATION ORDER: ship before EXP-251 to avoid a one-line class-name update in this EXP's wraps. The wrap structure is class-name-agnostic from the OUTSIDE — only the OUT-OF-SCOPE class names (.verdict-tag, .verdict-badge) appear inside the wraps, and those will be renamed by EXP-251's rename script regardless of order. Cleanest decoupling.
POST-INTEGRATION: human-notes.json HNOTE-PHASE-B-VERDICT-CHIP-DEFINITION-LINK-002 status moves from 'pending' to 'consumed' (or 'integrated') with consumed_progress.B4 entry pointing at EXP-252.

CASCADE: HNOTE-001 status can also move from 'pending' to 'consumed' once all three sub-items (B1/B2/B3) are integrated. Currently B1 (EXP-249) and B3 (EXP-251) are pending_curmudgeon_review; B2 (EXP-250) is closed-as-obsolete by decider.
